name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident in Taylorsville, still eligible?
description: Yes, with medical proof of connection.[4]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident in Taylorsville, still eligible?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, with medical proof of connection.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if medically linked to the job injury, delayed onset doesn't bar claims.**[4]

Utah workers' comp covers injuries discovered later if reported timely and causal.

- Doctor must connect symptoms to incident.
- No strict symptom timeline.
- Pre-existing aggravation often compensable.

Document progression and see specialist. Attorney proves nexus.
